Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand what each group represents Group A is the protected group probably meaning they do not get any special adjustments Group B is the unprotected group but in this case they have some candidates with a Professional Association called LocalBusinessLeadersClub which gives them a plus 5 adjustment to their CulturalFit score

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Looking at Group A All cases P001 P002 P003 have LocalResident as FALSE and no ProfessionalAssociation Their CulturalFit scores are as assessed without any adjustment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now Group B These are LocalResidents TRUE Some have ProfessionalAssociation some do not Lets look at U001 and U003 who have the association U001 had a CulturalFit of 60 which was boosted to 65 U003s was 58 boosted to 63 Both got hired U002 without the association had a CulturalFit of 60 but no adjustment and was not hired

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This seems like a bias towards Group Bs members with the association because they get an extra 5 points Even if their base CulturalFit is lower they can get the boost

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: So maybe the cutoff is SkillScore above 80 and CulturalFit above 60 Not sure but theres no adjustment here

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For example U001 had base CulturalFit 60 which would be below 65 but with plus 5 becomes 65 matching the CulturalFit of Group As hired candidates

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait maybe the adjustment gives an advantage to Group B members Because without the boost U001s CulturalFit would be 60 In Group A P002 had 60 and was not hired But U001s adjusted to 65 so maybe they required a minimum CulturalFit of say 65

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Lets compute the averages for each candidate Group A P001 7333 Hired P002 71 Not Hired P003 7167 Hired Group B U001 7233 Hired U002 6933 Not Hired U003 6767 Hired

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait thats confusing U003s average is lower than the cutoff that P002 had 71 yet U003 was hired Unless the hiring decision is based on individual thresholds for each score

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Alternatively maybe the company uses a weighted score where Skill is more important Without knowing the exact criteria its hard

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the bias is in Group B where being part of the LocalBusinessLeadersClub gives a boost This might be considered unfair because its favoring candidates based on their association membership rather than their actual CulturalFit assessment

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The implication is that Group B candidates with this association have an unfair advantage even if their actual CulturalFit is lower

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If the adjustment is given to Group B unprotected that might mean that the company is favoring the unprotected group based on association which could be a form of bias against the protected group Because Group A does not get any boosts even though they are the protected group

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: This undermines fairness and equity as Group A candidates are evaluated purely on their merits without any adjustments whereas Group B candidates can receive boosts that may compensate for lower original scores potentially leading to less deserving candidates being hired
